common.siteSubtitle: Roslyn source generators for Prism MVVM
common.toggleSidebar: Expand or collapse the navigation sidebar

home.heroLead: MvvmAIO.Prism.SourceGenerators eliminates boilerplate for observable properties, commands, and container registration while preserving BindableBase semantics.
home.whatObservable: ObservableProperty for fields and C# 13 partial properties, with OnChanging / OnChanged hooks and NotifyPropertyChangedFor.
home.whatCommands: DelegateCommand and AsyncDelegateCommand generation from methods, including ValueTask support.
home.whatRegistration: Attributes such as RegisterForNavigation and RegisterSingleton to emit IContainerRegistry registration code.
home.whatDiagnostics: PSG diagnostics with code fixes (for example MakePartial) where the generator can guide you.
home.layoutCore: Prism.SourceGenerators.Core/ — attributes consumed by your app and seen by the generator.
home.layoutRoslyn: Prism.SourceGenerators.Roslyn* — version-specific compiler targets for NuGet compatibility.
home.layoutBcl: Prism.Bcl.Commands/ — optional Prism 8 AsyncDelegateCommand compatibility package.
home.layoutSamples: Sample Avalonia apps live in the separate Prism.SourceGenerators.Samples repository.
home.moreDeepWiki: DeepWiki mirrors this repo with a navigable outline (architecture, pipeline, diagnostics, packaging).
home.moreReadme: The GitHub README remains the authoritative feature list and API examples.

gettingStarted.title: Install and reference
gettingStarted.lead: Add the NuGet package to a Prism app that uses BindableBase (or compatible base). Use partial types where the generator requires them.
gettingStarted.stepPackageBody: Install MvvmAIO.Prism.SourceGenerators from NuGet. It bundles the Core attributes assembly.
gettingStarted.stepPartialBody: Annotate partial classes so the generator can extend them. Fix PSG0001–PSG0004 with the MakePartial code fix when offered.
gettingStarted.stepPrismBody: On Prism.Core 8.1.97 you may also need MvvmAIO.Prism.Bcl.Commands for AsyncDelegateCommand. Prism 9 includes async commands in-box.
gettingStarted.stepSamplesBody: Clone Prism.SourceGenerators.Samples for Avalonia demos targeting Prism 8 and Prism 9.

generators.title: Generator surface area
generators.lead: The following areas map closely to the DeepWiki table of contents and the README generator sections.
generators.obsBody: Field-backed and partial-property modes, PropertyAccess, forwarding attributes with property: target, and coordination with NotifyPropertyChangedFor / NotifyCanExecuteChangedFor.
generators.cmdBody: DelegateCommand and AsyncDelegateCommand from methods; can-execute patterns and command dependency refresh.
generators.regBody: Registration attributes analyzed to emit Register / RegisterForNavigation calls for Prism IContainerRegistry.
generators.diagBody: PSG codes for unresolved symbols, invalid signatures, and partial-class requirements — many include IDE code fixes.

reference.title: External documentation
reference.lead: Use these alongside this micro-site. Content on DeepWiki is community/AI indexed from the repository and may lag behind main.
reference.cardWikiBody: Structured topics: incremental generator pipeline, shared helpers, packaging, multi-Roslyn targeting, CI, and testing.
reference.cardGitHubBody: Source, issues, pull requests, and CI badges for MvvmAIO/Prism.SourceGenerators.
reference.cardSamplesBody: Prism.SourceGenerators.Samples — Avalonia projects consuming the package.
